title: Eco Park
tagline: Eco Park — heritage city of West Bengal

overview.short: Eco Park (প্রকৃতি তীর্থ) is an urban park in New Town, Kolkata, India.
overview.description: Eco Park (প্রকৃতি তীর্থ) is an urban park in New Town, Kolkata, India. With an area of 190 hectares (480 acres), including a 42 hectares (104 acres) waterbody, Eco Park is the largest urban park in India. The park was conceptualised by Mamata Banerjee, the CM of West Bengal, in July 2011. It is constructed under the oversight of WBHIDCO, along with different other government bodies responsible for implementation of different works inside the park.

topPlaces.name: Jatragachhi
topPlaces.description: Jatragachhi is a census town in the Rajarhat CD block in the Bidhannagar subdivision of the North 24 Parganas district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Vivek Tirtha
topPlaces.description: Vivek Tirtha (in English: Vivek Pilgrimage) or Ramakrishna Mission Vivekananda Centre for Human Excellence and Social Sciences is a cultural and education centre dedicated to Swami Vivekananda in New Town, Kolkata, West Bengal, India. Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee laid the foundation stone of Vivek Tirtha on 11 November 2014.

topPlaces.name: Ghuni
topPlaces.description: Ghuni is a census town in the Rajarhat CD block in the Bidhannagar subdivision of the North 24 Parganas district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: New Town, Kolkata
topPlaces.description: New Town (a.k.a. Rajarhat-New Town) is a planned Satellite city of Kolkata in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Eco Park metro station (Kolkata)
topPlaces.description: Eco Park is a metro station of Orange Line of the Kolkata Metro. It is situated beside Eco Park and will serve the Nawabpur area of New Town.

topPlaces.name: Sulanggari
topPlaces.description: Sulangari is a census town in the Rajarhat CD block in the Bidhannagar subdivision of the North 24 Parganas district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Biswa Bangla Convention Centre
topPlaces.description: Biswa Bangla Convention Centre is a convention centre in New Town, West Bengal, India. It was built by West Bengal Housing Infrastructure Development Corporation (HIDCO) and opened in the year 2017.

topPlaces.name: Rekjuani
topPlaces.description: Rekjuani is a census town in the Rajarhat CD block in the Bidhannagar subdivision of the North 24 Parganas district in the state of West Bengal, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Eco Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Eco Park is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Eco Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (7 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (13 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Eco Park?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Eco Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Eco Park?
faq.a: Stays in Eco Park start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Eco Park?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jatragachhi, Vivek Tirtha, Ghuni, New Town, Kolkata, Eco Park metro station (Kolkata).
